summary: Iteration 80 - Products page i18n translations, filter aesthetics, and toast fix testing completed. All features verified working correctly in both English (EN) and Spanish (ES). Mobile filter panel with Apply button functional. Toast pointer-events CSS fix verified.

issues: Product images showing placeholder icons (broken Cloudinary URLs) - known issue from previous iterations

passed_tests: Products page loads with English title 'All Products' when locale is EN
Products page loads with Spanish title 'Todos los Productos' when locale is ES
Category dropdown has 21 optgroup structures for grouped categories
Category dropdown shows 'All Categories' (EN) / 'Todas las Categorias' (ES)
Category optgroups show translated names (EN: 'Meat & Eggs', ES: 'Carnes y huevos')
Country filter shows 'All Origins' (EN) / 'Todos los Origenes' (ES)
Country options translated (EN: Spain/Italy/France, ES: Espana/Italia/Francia)
Sort options translated (EN: 'Relevance/Price: Low to High', ES: 'Relevancia/Precio: Menor a Mayor')
Free Shipping label translated (EN: 'Free Shipping', ES: 'Envio Gratis')
Certification labels translated (EN: 'Vegan/Gluten-Free/Organic', ES: 'Vegano/Sin Gluten/Organico')
More filters button shows certifications panel when clicked
Mobile filter toggle button visible and functional on mobile viewport (390x844)
Mobile filter panel opens with all filters: Category, Free Shipping, Certifications, Country, Price Range, Sort
Mobile filter panel has Apply button at bottom ('Apply filters' / 'Aplicar filtros')
Mobile filter panel closes when clicking Apply button
Mobile filter panel has X close button functional
Active filter tags display selected category name with X to remove
Active filter tags display selected certification label with X to remove
Category filtering works - selecting category shows filtered products
Clear filters button restores all 9 products
Toast notification appears (pointer-events fix verified)
Toaster container has pointer-events: none (prevents mobile freeze)
Individual toast has pointer-events: auto (toast remains clickable)
critical_code_review_comments: ProductsPage.js correctly implements i18n with t() function for all filter labels
CategorySelect component properly uses optgroup structure with display_name from API
certificationOptions array uses t('certifications.X') for translated labels
countryOptions array uses t('countries.X') for translated country names
sortOptions array uses t('products.sort.X') for translated sort labels
Sonner toast fix correctly uses CSS !important to override pointer-events
Mobile filter panel properly locks body scroll when open (overflow: hidden)
Active filter tags use getCategoryDisplayName() to show translated category names

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All i18n translations and filter features verified)

seed_data_creation: None - tested existing products and translations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 80 verified the i18n translation improvements for ProductsPage: 1) All filters (categories, certifications, countries, sort options) fully translated in ES/EN. 2) Category dropdown uses optgroup structure with translated display names. 3) Mobile filter panel opens from right, shows all filters translated, has Apply button at bottom that closes panel. 4) Toast notification pointer-events CSS fix verified - toaster container has pointer-events:none, individual toasts have pointer-events:auto to prevent mobile page freeze. 5) Active filter tags show translated category/certification names. To test different languages: set localStorage hispaloshop_language to 'es','en','ko' then reload.
